title: andrographis macrobotrys
intro: Andrographis macrobotrys, also known as the King of Bitters, is a plant species in the genus Andrographis, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Andrographis macrobotrys include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
